title: phlox caespitosa subvar. piperi
intro: Phlox caespitosa subvar. piperi, also known as Piper's phlox or mountain phlox, is a rare alpine plant native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Phlox caespitosa subvar. piperi include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
